category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a cloud native PostgreSQL manager for high availability; official README describes PostgreSQL HA, replication, sentinels, keepers, and proxies.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stolon; official README title uses stolon.
docs_sources: Official repository has a doc directory and README documentation index.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/sorintlab/stolon; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables and official README describe PostgreSQL HA components, cluster stores, replication, and Kubernetes integration.
